mapper.select: SELECT h.HOTEL_NAME, r.ROOM_NAME, r.BASE_PRICE, r.MAX_CAPACITY FROM ROOM_TYPE r JOIN TBL_HOTEL h ON r.FK_HOTEL_ID = h.HOTEL_ID WHERE r.ROOM_TYPE_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PAYMENT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( payment_id, member_no, payment_amount, payment_method, payment_status, imp_uid, paid_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{member_no}, #{total_price}, 'CARD', 'PAID', #{imp_uid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_code, m.name, r.checkin_date, r.checkout_date, r.total_price, r.guest_count, rt.room_name, h.hotel_name FROM reservation r JOIN tbl_member_security m ON r.member_no = m.member_no JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON rt.fk_hotel_id = h.hotel_id WHERE r.reservation_code = #{value}
